component.name: PlaylistSelector

Label.text: Up/Down = Navigate | OK = Select | Back = Exit

component.script:
sub init() m.playlistList = m.top.findNode("playlistList") m.status = m.top.findNode("status") m.playlistList.setFocus(true) m.playlistList.observeField("itemSelected", "onItemSelected") m.top.observeField("focusedChild", "onFocusChanged") m.playlists = [] end sub
sub onFocusChanged() if m.top.hasFocus() print ">>> PlaylistSelector got focus, passing to list" m.playlistList.setFocus(true) end if end sub
sub loadPlaylists() m.status.text = "Loading playlists..."
m.task = CreateObject("roSGNode", "NetworkTask") m.task.apiBaseUrl = m.top.apiBaseUrl m.task.authToken = m.top.authToken m.task.requestType = "playlists" m.task.observeField("response", "onPlaylistsLoaded") m.task.control = "run" end sub
sub onPlaylistsLoaded() result = m.task.response
if result.success and result.data <> invalid and result.data.playlists <> invalid m.playlists = result.data.playlists content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") for each playlist in m.playlists item = content.CreateChild("ContentNode") songCount = 0 if playlist.song_count <> invalid then songCount = playlist.song_count item.title = playlist.name + " (" + songCount.tostr() + " songs)" end for m.playlistList.content = content m.status.text = m.playlists.count().tostr() + " playlists" else m.status.text = "Error: " + result.error end if end sub
sub onItemSelected() index = m.playlistList.itemSelected if index >= 0 and index < m.playlists.count() m.top.playlistSelected = m.playlists[index] end if end sub
